no-restricted-syntax.message: Direct innerHTML assignment is banned (PLAN.md Eng E13). Use textContent for plain text, or render-safe-html() with an explicit // safe-html: justification comment for sanitized HTML. The mechanism prose renderer is the one allowed exception.
Direct outerHTML assignment is banned (same rationale as innerHTML). Compose with createElement + appendChild.
insertAdjacentHTML bypasses our XSS defense (PLAN.md Eng E13). Compose with createElement + appendChild.
